title: ‘This is fine’ artist KC Green reaches agreement with AI startup Artisan
summary: KC Green, creator of the "This is fine" meme, reached an agreement with AI startup Artisan to remove advertisements using his artwork. The settlement marks a rare copyright victory as AI companies increasingly repurpose online content without permission.
content: The startup has apparently taken down the ads using KC Green's "This is fine" meme.

zh.title: "没关系"艺术家KC Green与AI创企Artisan达成协议
zh.summary: "没关系"迷因的创作者KC Green与AI创企Artisan达成协议，要求移除使用其作品的广告。该和解案例标志着一场罕见的版权胜利，因为AI公司越来越多地未经许可重新使用网络内容。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: It doesn’t matter that people hate the Ferrari Luce
summary: TechCrunch Mobility covers developments in transportation and the expanding role of AI in the sector. This edition discusses public response to new automotive innovations, including the Ferrari Luce.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

zh.title: TechCrunch Mobility：人们讨厌法拉利Luce无关紧要
zh.summary: TechCrunch Mobility报道交通运输领域的发展以及AI在该领域扩大的角色。本期讨论了公众对新汽车创新的反应，包括法拉利Luce。

title: Feeble Little Horse leans into digital weirdness on bitknot
summary: Feeble Little Horse's album "bitknot" represents a stylistic shift with sharper distortion and digital glitchiness as a core production element. The band demonstrates a distinct new creative direction while maintaining their experimental indie rock roots.
content:
Even the cover revels in a low-bit digital aesthetic. | Image: Saddle Creek / Feeble Little Horse	

From the opening moments of bitknot, it's obvious that Feeble Little Horse has found an entirely new gear. Where on Girl with Fish the blown-out textures were more '90s indie rock and shoegaze, on their latest LP, there's a more modern edge to the distortion and the riffs cut cleaner. Similarly, where the digital glitchiness was mostly relegated to window dressing on their sophomore record, on bitknot it's integral to the arrangements and a core part of their emerging, distinct sound. 
We got a preview of this new direction on the one-off single, and one of my favorite songs of 2025, "This Is Real." It blended blast beats, Sonic Youth-esque …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Feeble Little Horse在bitknot中倾向于数字怪异风格
zh.summary: Feeble Little Horse的专辑"bitknot"代表了一次风格转变，以更尖锐的失真和数字故障感作为核心制作元素。乐队展示了独特的新创意方向，同时保持了实验性独立摇滚根基。

title: United flight forced to turn around because of a Bluetooth speaker name
summary: United Airlines flight 236 from Newark to Palma de Mallorca returned to its origin after just one hour due to security concerns involving a Bluetooth speaker's device name. The incident highlights unexpected vulnerabilities in aviation security protocols.
content:
An hour in flight UA236 returned to Newark. | Screenshot: The Verge	

United flight 236 from Newark to Palma de Mallorca on Saturday night was forced to turn around just an hour after takeoff due to security concerns around a Bluetooth signal. Multiple Redditors claimed to be on the flight and reported that the crew repeatedly requested passengers to turn off their Bluetooth. According to one poster, the crew issued a one-minute warning, saying that two devices were still active. 
One Redditor reported flight attendants making comments like, "This little joke is ruining it for everyone."
An archived recording from Air Traffic Control (embedded below) confirms that the root of the issue was the name of a disc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 联合航空班机因蓝牙扬声器名称被迫掉头
zh.summary: 联合航空236号班机从纽瓦克飞往帕尔马德马略卡岛仅一小时后因蓝牙扬声器设备名称引发的安全隐患而返回出发地。该事件凸显了航空安全协议中存在的意外漏洞。

title: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
summary: TechCrunch's Equity podcast explores whether technology CEOs are particularly susceptible to "AI psychosis," debating the prevalence of misconceptions about artificial intelligence within the tech industry.
content: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether tech CEOs are "uniquely prone to AI psychosis."

zh.title: 理解关于人工智能妄想症的辩论
zh.summary: TechCrunch的Equity播客探讨科技首席执行官是否特别容易患上"人工智能妄想症"，讨论科技行业对人工智能的误解是否普遍存在。

title: Black founders raise highest amount of quarterly funding since 2022, but there’s a catch
summary: Black founders achieved their highest quarterly funding total since 2022, signaling potential progress in venture capital access. However, persistent barriers remain including limited access to investor networks and early introductions that would accelerate opportunity flow.
content: Speaking to TechCrunch, Crunchbase’s head of research Gené Teare, said the factors holding back Black founders include “access to networks, relationships, and early introductions."

zh.title: 黑人创始人融资额达2022年以来最高，但有一个陷阱
zh.summary: 黑人创始人实现了自2022年以来最高的季度融资总额，标志着风险投资获取方面的潜在进步。然而，包括投资者网络接触有限和早期介绍机会不足等持久性障碍仍然存在，这些因素会加速机会流的发展。

title: This extravagant gaming laptop could ruin other screens for you
summary: The Asus ROG Strix Scar 18 features an 18-inch Mini LED display that sets a new visual standard for portable gaming. Equipped with top-tier specs including an Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX CPU and RTX 5090 GPU, the laptop delivers exceptional performance and display quality.
content:
A speedy 18-inch Mini LED that needs to be seen to be believed. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

My eyes have seen the PC gaming promised land, and it's a beautifully bright world without a shred of blurriness. It's warm, it looks lovely, and it's impeccably sharp. Also, it's expensive as hell.
I've dipped my toe in this world by testing a pre-production version of the upcoming Asus ROG Strix Scar 18, which was recently announced ahead of Computex 2026. It's a gigantic 18-inch gaming laptop that comes with a top-of-the-line 24-core Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX CPU and can be fully kitted out with an RTX 5090 Laptop GPU and 128GB of RAM. Asus sent me a model to test that's maxed out on all specs except storage (it's got "just" 4TB). And of  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款奢华游戏笔记本可能会让其他屏幕显得黯淡无光
zh.summary: 华硕ROG Strix Scar 18采用18英寸Mini LED显示屏，为便携式游戏树立了新的视觉标准。该笔记本配备英特尔酷睿Ultra 9 290HX处理器和RTX 5090 GPU等顶级规格，提供卓越的性能和显示质量。

title: 007 First Light is already discounted for the PS5 and Steam
summary: IO Interactive's James Bond game "007 First Light" is already available at discounts across PS5 and Steam. The third-person stealth sandbox combines gameplay elements from Hitman and Uncharted, with early pricing starting at $60.89.
content:
IO Interactive’s 007 First Light is here, and it’s just as stunning a James Bond mov — err, video game — as we hoped it would be. Pardon the confusion, the title’s engaging tutorial really feels like you’re watching a great Bond movie at times. Whether you’re a longtime Hitman fan who’s been eagerly waiting for the studio’s latest game or not, there are deals to be had on both the PlayStation 5 and Steam PC versions.
007 First Light

Where to Buy:

 $69.99 $62.99 at Costco (PS5, Standard)
 $69.99 $60.89 at Fanatical (Steam, Standard)
 $79.99 $69.59 at Fanatical (Steam, Deluxe)

Costco members, for instance, can already take advantage of an online-only deal on the disc-based PS5 version, which knocks it down to $62.99 (originally $69.99). It’s not a big discount, but it’s currently the best out there across major retailers. If you have a desktop PC or handheld gaming PC powerful enough to run the game, the Steam version is a little cheaper at Fanatical. The standard digital edition is going for $60.89, while the deluxe digital edition, which includes in-game cosmetics, is down to $69.59 (about $10 off).
First Light is similar in a sense to recent Hitman games. It’s a third-person stealth sandbox game, after all, but it has a little more in common with Naughty Dog’s Uncharted series thanks to its hand-to-hand combat system, quippy protagonist, and wide variety of missions that either have you on foot using fun gadgets or behind the wheel of a muscle car.
Read our full 007 First Light review.

zh.title: 《007：初光》已在PS5和Steam上推出折扣价
zh.summary: IO Interactive的詹姆斯·邦德游戏《007：初光》已在PS5和Steam上以折扣价发售。这款第三人称隐身沙盒游戏融合了《杀手》和《神秘海域》的游戏元素，早期定价从$60.89起。

title: Marathon’s second season is a chance for Bungie to turn things around
summary: A dedicated player completed Bungie's live-service shooter Marathon after 185 hours and defeating the raid-style Compiler boss. The demanding progression system prompted the player to take a break, illustrating the grueling nature of the experience.
content:
Earlier this month, I finally achieved the elusive goal I had set for myself in Bungie's Marathon. I collected six of the game's rarest items, allowing me to attempt and then successfully clear the raid-style Compiler boss. I felt a massive weight lift off my shoulders - nearly 185 hours of playtime and I had managed to complete Marathon's pinnacle activity. A day later, I took my first break from the game. 
I had been playing Marathon virtually every day since it launched in March, and I needed to put it down. Treating a Bungie game like it's a grueling second job is nothing new. Certainly not for me or the many fellow Destiny players that …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《马拉松》第二赛季是Bungie扭转局面的机会
zh.summary: 一位忠实玩家在185小时后完成了Bungie的运营型射击游戏《马拉松》，并击败了突袭风格的编译器首领。严苛的进度系统迫使玩家休息，体现了这段体验的艰辛程度。

title: NASA confirms exploding meteor caused the sonic boom over Boston
summary: NASA confirmed a bright meteor explosion over the northeastern United States on Saturday caused a sonic boom felt north of Cape Cod Bay. The event was captured on satellite imagery and witnessed by multiple residents who initially mistook it for an earthquake.
content:
Meteor caught by the GOES-19 weather satellite breaking up 40 miles above the ground. | Image: CIRA	

On Saturday, at around 2:06 pm ET, a meteor streaked over the northeastern US and exploded north of Cape Cod Bay. The fireball was caught on camera by several people, shook houses, and can even be seen clearly in satellite imagery, lighting up the sky. 


  
 
  
 


 

 View this post on Instagram

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 



Some residents initially thought that the shaking and boom may have been an earthquake, but the United States Geological Survey (USGS) denied that, saying that it was a "widely felt sonic boom from a suspected bolide." In a statement posted on X, NASA described the event as a "bright fireball… accompanied by a loud noise." 
The meteor was t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: NASA确认爆炸陨石导致波士顿上空音爆
zh.summary: 美国宇航局确认，周六在美国东北部发生的明亮陨石爆炸在科德角湾北部引起音爆。该事件被卫星图像捕获，并被多名起初误以为是地震的居民目击。

title: What happens in Vega$: steroids, swimmers, and a billion-dollar hustle
summary: The Enhanced Games, a sporting competition featuring mostly athletes on performance-enhancing drugs, represents an emerging business model gaining traction with technology industry leaders. The venture signals a potential shift in how the tech sector views and monetizes previously taboo athletic activities.
content: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business model that the tech industry is ready to embrace.

zh.title: 在Vega$发生了什么：类固醇、游泳运动员和十亿美元大计划
zh.summary: "增强游戏"是一项主要由服用性能增强型药物的运动员参加的体育比赛，代表了在科技行业领导者中获得关注的新兴商业模式。该企业标志着科技部门对以前禁忌的体育活动的看法和货币化方式可能发生的转变。

title: I went looking for the AI weed vape that gives you Bitcoin for smoking
summary: A reporter investigating claims about "Gudtrip," an AI-powered cannabis vape allegedly offering Bitcoin rewards, discovered the product and marketing were far more dubious than advertised. The investigation required weeks of research spanning continents to uncover the reality behind the viral hype.
content:
The crypto weed vape found me on 4/20, the high holiday of cannabis enthusiasts everywhere. It arrived over Slack with the thumbnail of a man exhaling a plume of vapor, the words "every hit delivers Bitcoin" emblazoned across it. It claimed to be advertising a device called Gudtrip, and I thought everything about it sounded fake.
So I went looking for it. What I eventually found, after weeks of searching, dozens of emails, and a reporting effort that spanned continents, was somehow even dumber than I'd imagined.
My first port of call was Gudtrip's website, which only made the vape seem more like a prank. The company's description of the pr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我去寻找那款声称吸烟可获得比特币的人工智能大麻电子烟
zh.summary: 一名记者调查了关于"Gudtrip"的声称——一款声称提供比特币奖励的人工智能大麻电子烟，发现该产品和营销的可信度远低于宣传。该调查需要数周的跨越多个大洲的研究才能揭露病毒式炒作背后的现实。

title: User-replaceable batteries are coming back in a big way
summary: The European Union has mandated user-replaceable batteries in portable tech devices, with regulations already in effect for smartphones and tablets and another taking force next year. The legislation aims to extend product longevity, improve repairability, and increase recyclability across consumer electronics.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about gadgets and smartphones, follow Dominic Preston. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
In 2023, the European Union agreed on two landmark pieces of legislation mandating how portable tech products with batteries must be designed, aiming to improve longevity, repairability, and recyclability. Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/1670 came into force last year and applies specifically to smartphones and tablets, while Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 takes effect next year …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 用户可更换电池重新大规模回归
zh.summary: 欧盟已强制要求便携式科技设备配备用户可更换电池，相关规定已对智能手机和平板电脑生效，另一项规定将在明年生效。该法规旨在延长产品寿命、改善可修复性并提高消费电子产品的可回收性。

title: On its 40th anniversary, we reassess 1986's SpaceCamp
summary: Ars Technica revisits the 1986 film SpaceCamp on its 40th anniversary, questioning whether it qualifies as a hidden gem, cult classic, or misguided production. The publication concludes it somehow embodies all three characteristics at once.
content: Is it a hidden gem, a cult classic, or hopelessly dumb? We vote "all of the above."

zh.title: 四十年后重新评价1986年的《太空营》
zh.summary: Ars Technica在1986年电影《太空营》四十周年纪念之际重新审视，质疑它是否是一部遗珠、小众经典还是方向错误的作品。该媒体认为它奇异地同时具备这三种特征。

title: The Mercedes CLA offers great EV specs for an average price
summary: Mercedes-Benz launches the CLA compact sedan for 2026-2027 model years, offering strong EV specifications and amenities at approximately $50,000, filling a gap in the affordable electric sedan segment. The vehicle features improved battery capacity, faster charging, and refined interior design alongside engaging driving dynamics.
content:
Despite headwinds from the current administration, automakers continue to release well-equipped EVs with bigger battery packs and increasingly faster charging speeds. For those who want to travel further between plugging in, the future is still bright, just slightly tinted.
But there haven't been many sedans starting around or below $50,000, as crossover SUVs have largely taken up this territory. Now, Mercedes-Benz has released its CLA compact sedan which ticks every box above for the 2026 and 2027 model year, and throws in pleasant interior amenities and fun driving character for good measure.
What's inside
The CLA w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 梅赛德斯-奔驰CLA以亲民价格提供卓越的电动车性能
zh.summary: 梅赛德斯-奔驰为2026-2027年推出CLA紧凑型轿车，以约50,000美元的价格提供强劲的电动车性能和配置，填补经济型电动轿车细分市场的空白。该车型具有改进的电池容量、更快的充电速度和精致的内部设计，同时提供出色的驾驶体验。

title: They call it stupid hot for a reason: Heat muddles animal brains
summary: Rising temperatures are affecting animal cognition and behavior, with extreme heat causing some species to become more aggressive while others struggle with learning and memory. The phenomenon highlights how climate change impacts wildlife beyond habitat loss through direct neurological effects.
content: As temperatures rise, some creatures pick fights while others struggle to learn.

zh.title: 他们称之为"热得离谱"是有原因的：炎热扰乱动物大脑
zh.summary: 气温上升正在影响动物的认知和行为，极端高温导致某些物种变得更具攻击性，而其他物种则在学习和记忆方面陷入困境。这一现象表明气候变化除了造成栖息地丧失外，还通过直接的神经生物学效应对野生动物产生影响。
